name: stop-slop
description: Codex plugin for removing AI writing tells from prose.

interface.longDescription: Stop Slop helps Codex rewrite, review, and tighten prose by removing predictable AI writing patterns such as throat-clearing, filler, business jargon, false drama, passive phrasing, and formulaic structures.
defaultPrompt: Use Stop Slop to tighten this draft.
Review this README for AI writing tells.
Rewrite this paragraph in a direct human voice.
